topStories.title: Stryker cyberattack: Iranian group claims responsibility - 'Erased 200,000 systems, extracted 50 terabytes of data'
topStories.description: In a statement, Handala referred to the US missile attack on a girls' school in Minab city of Iran, that killed dozens, as one of the reasons for the hacking.

topStories.title: Chile’s new president has praised Pinochet, a dictator. What does it mean?
topStories.description: Experts say the views of newly inaugurated president Jose Antonio Kast reflect deep dissatisfaction with the status quo.

topStories.title: Bowen: Trump has called for an Iran uprising but the lessons from Iraq in 1991 loom large
topStories.description: The US president might learn that starting wars is much easier than ending them, writes the BBC's international editor.

topStories.title: 'Even under missiles we carry on living' - how young Iranians are coping with war
topStories.description: Iranians say they are sheltering at home and rarely venturing out on near-empty streets as the US-Israeli bombing campaign continues.

dailyNews.title: National Conference alleges attempt to kill Farooq Abdullah in Jammu; one detained
dailyNews.description: A man with a loaded pistol got within point-blank range of NC president and opened fire, says J&K CM Omar Abdullah

dailyNews.title: Oil tanker seized by US in relation to Venezuela set to transfer crude to smaller vessel
dailyNews.description: USA-VENEZUELA/TANKER-SEIZURE:Oil tanker seized by US in relation to Venezuela set to transfer crude to smaller vessel

dailyNews.title: Three brothers arrested after explosion at US embassy in Oslo
dailyNews.description: Norway's police attorney says the authorities are investigating whether a foreign state actor was involved.

dailyNews.title: Trump attacks Thomas Massie as ‘worst Republican Congressman’, endorses Gallrein in Kentucky primary
dailyNews.description: US President Donald Trump sharply criticised Thomas Massie and endorsed his primary challenger as tensions grow within the Republican Party ahead of the midterm elections. Massie has opposed several Trump policies, including strikes on Iran and efforts to curb presidential war powers.

dailyNews.title: FBI warns of possible Iranian drone threat to California: Report
dailyNews.description: The alert indicated that Iran could retaliate against American attacks by launching drones along the West Coast.

dailyNews.title: What’s left in Iran ‘could be taken out in an hour’, says Trump
dailyNews.description: President Trump has told reporters that the US has destroyed Iran’s navy, anti-aircraft systems, radars and leadership.

dailyNews.title: FIFA World Cup: US war on Iran, Mexico violence, visa bans, Iraq qualifier
dailyNews.description: The FIFA World Cup 2026 was billed as one of the easiest to organise, but challenges still lie in wait.

dailyNews.title: Countries agree to record release of emergency oil reserves as prices surge
dailyNews.description: The G7 group of nations welcomes the idea of releasing oil in response to the surge in prices since the US-Israel war with Iran began

dailyNews.title: US military confirms use of ‘advanced AI tools’ in war against Iran
dailyNews.description: Admiral Brad Cooper says artificial intelligence is helping process data, but humans are making final decisions.

dailyNews.title: ‘Practically nothing left to target’: Trump says Iran war will end ‘soon’
dailyNews.description: Trump insisted that the military operation had already caused extensive damage to Iranian capabilities.

dailyNews.title: U.S. at Fault in Strike on School in Iran, Preliminary Inquiry Says
dailyNews.description: Outdated targeting data may have resulted in a mistaken missile strike, according to the ongoing military investigation, which undercuts President Trump’s assertion that Iran could be to blame.

dailyNews.title: How Trump and His Advisers Miscalculated Iran’s Response to War
dailyNews.description: In the lead-up to the U.S.-Israeli attack, President Trump downplayed the risks to the energy markets as a short-term concern that should not overshadow the mission to decapitate the Iranian regime.

dailyNews.title: Thune Is in a Vise as Trump and the Far Right Demand a Fight on SAVE America Act
dailyNews.description: The majority leader is getting pounded for not pushing hard enough, but he says the votes just aren’t there to circumvent the filibuster.

dailyNews.title: Republicans Concede They Need a Pivot on Immigration Ahead of Midterms
dailyNews.description: In public comments and private meetings at a House G.O.P. retreat, top officials allowed that President Trump’s immigration crackdown had hurt the party and that they needed a course correction on the issue.

dailyNews.title: James Fishback, a Republican Candidate for Florida Governor, Is Running on Rage Bait
dailyNews.description: Young conservatives in Florida are fascinated by James Fishback, a long-shot gubernatorial candidate known for his provocative online posts.

dailyNews.title: U.S. Seeks Extradition of Maduro Ally Alex Saab From Venezuela
dailyNews.description: The indicted tycoon Alex Saab is being detained in Venezuela on a U.S. request. His case tests President Trump’s sway over the country’s new rulers.

dailyNews.title: 17 Democratic States Sue Over Trump Demand Colleges Provide Race Data
dailyNews.description: The Trump administration wants colleges and universities to share information about the race and gender of applicants to make sure they’re not using racial preferences in admissions.

dailyNews.title: Trump Documents Missing in Epstein Files Highlight DOJ’s Missteps
dailyNews.description: In late July, an F.B.I. agent asked colleagues to get started on a sensitive task relating to Jeffrey Epstein, listing the names of 14 prominent men, with President Trump at the top.

dailyNews.title: Why Falling Cats Always Seem to Land on Their Feet
dailyNews.description: It takes backbone to solve an enigma like the “falling cat” problem.

dailyNews.title: Trump Administration to Announce New Trade Investigations
dailyNews.description: The investigations into unfair trade practices will likely lead to tariffs on foreign countries, as the administration works to replace the import taxes struck down by the Supreme Court.

dailyNews.title: Trump Is the Anti-Trump
dailyNews.description: There is an alternate universe in which the president is the popular, successful figure of his imagination.

dailyNews.title: Top US court hands Trump a win on deportations as SCOTUS challenge looms
dailyNews.description: A US appeals court intervened at the last minute to greenlight Trump's third-country deportation policy from taking force, handing the administration a win — if only temporarily.

dailyNews.title: Epstein accountant testifies he never saw 'any type of transaction' with Trump, Comer says
dailyNews.description: Epstein accountant Richard Kahn testified he saw no payments to Donald Trump, as House Oversight Chair James Comer reveals five major figures who funded Jeffrey Epstein.

dailyNews.title: Reporter's Notebook: Trump's SAVE Act ultimatum runs into Senate reality
dailyNews.description: Trump demands Senate Republicans pass SAVE America Act requiring proof of citizenship to vote, but GOP leaders say they lack votes for filibuster.

dailyNews.title: House GOP leader launches Senate bid as Trump taps Markwayne Mullin for DHS
dailyNews.description: GOP Rep. Kevin Hern launches his Oklahoma Senate bid to replace DHS nominee Markwayne Mullin, vowing to be a "loyal ally" to President Trump’s "America First" agenda.

dailyNews.title: Trump asks Supreme Court to let it end legal protections for 350,000 Haitians
dailyNews.description: The Trump administration asked the Supreme Court to clear the way for it to end temporary deportation protections for more than 350,000 Haitian immigrants.

dailyNews.title: Trump vows to end war "soon" as Iran hits ships and threatens banks
dailyNews.description: President Trump says he'll end the war soon, when he wants to, as Iran hits three ships near the Strait of Hormuz and warns U.S.-linked banks will be next.

dailyNews.title: What to know about the agency Trump says will insure ships in the Gulf
dailyNews.description: President Trump said the government agency will provide political risk insurance to "all shipping lines" operating in the Persian Gulf.

dailyNews.title: 3/07: Saturday Morning
dailyNews.description: President Trump said on social media that Iran will be "hit very hard" on Saturday after Iranian President Masoud Pezeshkian apologized to the country's regional neighbors for retaliatory strikes against Israel and U.S. bases in the Middle East.
